# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Prevent istio egress unrestricted.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.thirdparty.com
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.thirdparty.com
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - route:
        - destination:
            host: api.thirdparty.com
            port:
              number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.externaldb.com
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: postgresql
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.externaldb.com
  gateways:
    - mesh
  tcp:
    - route:
        - destination:
            host: db.externaldb.com
            port:
              number: 5432
